name: Halloween: Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------ORANGE & GREEN FILLING---------------------------
1. In a large bowl, beat together butter and sugar until well blended.
2. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla; mix until combined.
3. Stir in cocoa powder and salt; blend until smooth.
4. Refrigerate dough for 1-2 hours or until firm enough to handle.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Lightly grease cookie sheets with butter.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on sheets.
8. Press a thumb gently in the center of each ball to create an indentation.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set.
10. Cool slightly, then transfer cookies to wire racks to cool completely.
To Assemble:
1. Spoon about 1/4 teaspoon orange filling into each indentation.
2. Decorate with green filling to resemble a pumpkin stem.
3. ORANGE AND GREEN FILLING: In a small bowl, beat powdered sugar and softened butter until smooth. Remove about 2 tablespoons of the mixture; tint this green and set aside. Add freshly grated orange zest to the remaining icing and color with red and yellow food coloring to create orange.
4. GHOST COOKIES: Make the same icing without food coloring and use it as a white filling for ghost-shaped cookies.
Note: The attribution line has been removed as per the instructions.
